extName.description: Extension name in the Chrome Web Store and browser UI.

extDescription.message: Bridge ChatGPT, Gemini, or Grok (web) to your apps via a self-hosted relay.
extDescription.description: Short description shown in the extension management UI.

bgActionTitleDefault.description: Toolbar action tooltip when no update is advertised.

bgActionTitleUpdateAvailable.description: Toolbar action tooltip when relay reports a newer extension version.

bgRelayHttpError.description: Version check: non-OK HTTP status from relay. $1 = status code.

bgRelayVersionMissingExtension.description: Version check: JSON body did not include extension semver.

bgRelaySocketAttach404.message: Relay could not attach this socket (404). Click Connect again.

bgRelayRegistrationFailed.description: WebSocket registration failed. $1 = HTTP status, $2 = response snippet.

bgRegisterFetchError.description: Network or exception while calling relay after socket connect. $1 = message.

bgGenericError.description: Passthrough for unknown errors (version check catch, etc.). $1 = message.
